title: Blue M DCC-146C Convection Oven
location: Gilroy, California, United States of America
longDescription:
From Manufacture: Blue M ovens are mechanical convection, electric heated chambers that include safety features recommended in NFPA Bulletin 86 as standard. The design of the chamber concedes that the element temperature may be well above the auto-ignition point of some flammable materials. However, this is mitigated by maintaining a non-explosive mixture through the use of higher than normal exhaust rates. Increased element KW compensates for this exhaust factor or increase in makeup/intake air.

Sold as-is, with no warranties or guarantees.
Assistance available for loading at pickup.
Please feel free to contact us with any questions.

title: MPM Corporation Ultraprint 3000 Series Screen Printer
location: Gilroy, California, United States of America
longDescription:
For sale is an MPM Corporation Ultraprint 3000 Series Printer — a high-performance industrial SMT screen/stencil printer used for solder paste printing in electronics assembly and manufacturing. This machine is designed for precision deposition of solder paste onto printed circuit boards (PCBs) during surface-mount technology (SMT) production. Ultraprint 3000 printers are known for their reliable operation, repeatable alignment, and flexibility for handling a wide range of board sizes and production requirements.

Features:
• MPM Ultraprint 3000 Series screen printer for SMT solder paste printing and stencil applications
• Automatic and programmable stencil printing for PCB assembly operations
• Vision alignment and repeatability features (varies by installed options)
• Capable of handling large boards and high throughput manufacturing processes
• Typically used in electronics manufacturing, prototyping, and PCB assembly environments

Removed from working use
Sold as-is, with no warranties or guarantees.
Assistance available for loading at pickup.
Please reach out to DJ for any questions: DJ@factorx.com | (808)649-0700

longDescription:
2005 INTERNATIONAL 4300 CONVENTIONAL CAB, 7.6L L6 DIESEL.

2004 International 4300 box truck (medium-duty straight truck), VIN 1HTMMAAN25H136891, manufactured by International Truck and Engine Corporation in September 2004, white cab with white aluminum refrigerated/insulated box body (likely Morgan or similar, with green ivy leaf graphics from prior Stone Mtn Tires LLC / Logistics livery), DT466 inline 6-cylinder diesel engine (7.6L, Power Stroke series, approximately 210–300 hp depending on tune), Allison automatic transmission (likely 2000 or 2400 series 5-speed), rear-wheel drive (4x2 configuration), GVWR approximately 25,999–33,000 lbs (CDL-exempt or borderline based on plate), single rear axle with air brakes, spring suspension, 22.5-inch steel wheels with low-profile tires, hydraulic brakes, air horn, dual vertical exhaust, and pintle hitch or tow provisions absent in views.

The unit did not arrive under its own power and was towed as part of the judicial liquidation process. At the time of intake, the truck was found to be non-operational with no start or drive capability observed. Our team conducted only a visual inspection with no further diagnostics or troubleshooting performed, and the specific cause of the non-operation is unknown.

Physical condition reflects standard wear and tear typical of a vehicle of this model year and mileage, which may include cosmetic blemishes, minor dings, or surface corrosion.

On-site inspections are strongly encouraged and can be scheduled by appointment only, Monday through Friday, between 10:00 AM and 4:00 PM Eastern Time, with FACETIME viewing available as an alternative to ensure bidders have a complete understanding before purchase.

This vehicle is being sold AS-IS, WHERE-IS strictly, with no warranties or guarantees expressed or implied; all sales are final, and no refunds will be provided under any circumstances.

All descriptions, including written specifications and any accompanying photos or videos, are intended to represent the asset’s condition accurately. If there is any discrepancy, the written description takes precedence, as it is the most reliable record and can be updated to reflect any verified findings.

We urge every bidder to read the entire listing in full, conduct their own due diligence, and reach out to us with any questions or concerns before bidding; our team lists all assets in good faith and will make every reasonable effort to accommodate inquiries.

Our agency specializes in the sale of assets obtained through judicial liquidation, including bankruptcy, divorce, probate, repossessions, lien foreclosures, donations, and other court-mandated settlements, as well as government-owned and government-contracted equipment and vehicles.

By placing a bid, you enter into a legally binding contract to purchase this asset. Do not bid unless you fully intend and can complete the transaction.

Shipping and transport assistance is available as a courtesy service and is not mandatory. If utilizing a third-party pickup agent, proper identification and a signed Bill of Sale will still be required at the time of release.

title: 1986 GMC C7D042
location: Marble Falls, Texas, United States of America
longDescription:
1986 GMC C7D042 Water Truck – 6.0L V8

Selling our 1986 GMC water truck. This unit was a dependable part of our operation for years and was specifically used for fog seal work. It performed reliably when in service and was only taken out of rotation after we upgraded to a larger, newer truck to handle increased workload.

Conventional cab
6.0L V8 engine
Set up as a water/fog seal truck
Proven work truck with years of consistent use
Complete unit – not pieced apart or stripped

The truck is currently not running due to sitting, not because of any known major failure when it was parked. With some basic mechanical attention (battery, fuel system check, etc.), it has strong potential to be put back into service or used as a solid project or backup unit.

Ideal for:
Seal coat / paving companies
Ranch or property water use
Equipment operators needing a budget-friendly truck
Mechanics or anyone looking for a rebuildable work truck

This is a great opportunity to pick up a heavy-duty truck that has already proven itself in the field. These older GMC work trucks are known for their durability and straightforward mechanics, making them easier to work on than newer models.

Feel free to reach out with any questions

location: Gilroy, California, United States of America
longDescription:
MYDATA Automation MY12 surface mount pick-and-place machine designed for automated PCB assembly and electronic component placement. This type of equipment is commonly used in SMT production lines to accurately place components onto printed circuit boards during manufacturing.

The system features a long component placement table with numbered positions and integrated operator control panels on both sides. Designed for high-precision electronics manufacturing environments, MYDATA placement systems are known for flexible feeder handling and automated placement capabilities.

This unit is configured as a full industrial SMT placement machine and may be suitable for electronics manufacturing operations, refurbishment, spare parts use, or integration into existing PCB assembly lines.

• Manufacturer: Mydata Automation
• Model: MY12
• Equipment Type: SMT Pick & Place Machine
• Application: Automated surface mount component placement for PCB assembly

title: LOT of 13 Liquid Storage TANKS
location: Geneva, Ohio, United States of America
longDescription:
LOT of 13 Liquid Storage TANKS

Previously Stored material in the Tanks:
 
Rhino Snot is the nickname for Envirotac II, a soil stabilization and dust-control product made by Environmental Products & Applications (EP&A). It is a polymer-based liquid that is sprayed onto soil, gravel, or dirt roads to bind particles together and create a harder surface.

Safety Data Sheet (SDS) Hazard Information

Product: Envirotac II Soil Stabilizer (commonly referred to as “Rhino Snot”)
Manufacturer: Environmental Products & Applications (EP&A)

Hazard Classification:
This product is not classified as hazardous under OSHA Hazard Communication Standard (29 CFR 1910.1200).

Precautionary Statements:

Avoid prolonged contact with skin and eyes.

Use appropriate personal protective equipment when handling.

Wash thoroughly after handling.

Prevent large quantities from entering waterways or drains.

First Aid Measures:

Eyes: Rinse cautiously with water for several minutes.

Skin: Wash with soap and water.

Ingestion: Rinse mouth and seek medical advice if irritation occurs.

Inhalation: Move to fresh air if respiratory irritation occurs.

Spill Procedures:
Contain and collect material with absorbent material and dispose of according to local regulations.

Disposal:
Dispose of contents and containers in accordance with federal, state, and local regulations.

Notice:
Buyers are responsible for reviewing the full Safety Data Sheet (SDS) and complying with all applicable handling, storage, transportation, and disposal requirements.

Item sold as-is, where-is, with no warranties or guarantees expressed or implied.

location: Houston, Texas, United States of America
longDescription:
THIS IS AUCTION FOR ONE (1) Dimmable Explosion Proof, Waterproof Fluorescent Light -Paint Booth, Rigs - 2 Lamp - 4 foot

Made in the USA

The Larson Electronics EPL-48-2L-T5HO-D Dimmable Explosion Proof Fluorescent Light Fixture is NRTL Listed for United States and Canada, Class 1 Division 1 and Class 1 Division 2 for hazardous locations where flammable chemical/petrochemical vapors exist or have the potential to exist. The unit carries a T6 temperature rating, it is also approved for Paint Spray Booths. Click here to see the LED version of this light

The EPL-48-2L-T5HO-D fixture is a 4 foot long, 2 lamp, Class 1 Division 1 and Class 2 Division 1&2 explosion proof dimmable fluorescent light which is also approved for use in paint spray booth applications. This T6 temperature rated fixture comes standard with two T5HO fluorescent lamps. The lamps are protected by heat and impact resistant Pyrex tubes and the fixture is constructed of copper free aluminum alloy. The lamp reflectors are corrosion resistant heavy gauge aluminum and coated with a high gloss reflective finish. This fixture is multi-voltage capable and is equipped with an Advance Mark 7 dimming ballast. The EPL-48-2L-T5HO-D provides operators in hazardous locations with a reliable and affordable lighting solution that provides the best explosion proof protection available without sacrificing light quality or fixture durability.

title: ONE (1) Dimmable Explosion Proof, EPL-48-2L-T5HO-D Waterproof Fluorescent Light -Paint Booth, Rigs - 2 Lamp - 4 foot
location: Houston, Texas, United States of America
longDescription:
THIS IS AUCTION FOR ONE (1) Dimmable Explosion Proof, Waterproof Fluorescent Light -Paint Booth, Rigs - 2 Lamp - 4 foot

Made in the USA

The Larson Electronics EPL-48-2L-T5HO-D Dimmable Explosion Proof Fluorescent Light Fixture is NRTL Listed for United States and Canada, Class 1 Division 1 and Class 1 Division 2 for hazardous locations where flammable chemical/petrochemical vapors exist or have the potential to exist. The unit carries a T6 temperature rating, it is also approved for Paint Spray Booths. Click here to see the LED version of this light

The EPL-48-2L-T5HO-D fixture is a 4 foot long, 2 lamp, Class 1 Division 1 and Class 2 Division 1&2 explosion proof dimmable fluorescent light which is also approved for use in paint spray booth applications. This T6 temperature rated fixture comes standard with two T5HO fluorescent lamps. The lamps are protected by heat and impact resistant Pyrex tubes and the fixture is constructed of copper free aluminum alloy. The lamp reflectors are corrosion resistant heavy gauge aluminum and coated with a high gloss reflective finish. This fixture is multi-voltage capable and is equipped with an Advance Mark 7 dimming ballast. The EPL-48-2L-T5HO-D provides operators in hazardous locations with a reliable and affordable lighting solution that provides the best explosion proof protection available without sacrificing light quality or fixture durability.
Very heavy industrial fixtures
Long 4 feet
Unused 

WE HAVE OVER 10 PIECES IN CASE YOU NEED MORE

title: Bulk Lot of Assorted Backpacks, Computer Bags & Briefcases
company: Blount County Fire Protection District, TN
location: Maryville, Tennessee, United States of America
longDescription:
Bulk Lot of Assorted Backpacks, Computer Bags & Briefcases

Item Condition: Used / Sold As-Is

Description
This auction is for a mixed lot of assorted bags, backpacks, and briefcases. This lot includes a variety of styles suitable for professional office use, travel, commuting, or rugged utility.

Lot contents include:

Backpacks: Includes one tan/coyote tactical-style backpack featuring multiple compartments, exterior buckle straps, a clear ID window, and "Blackhawk" branding, plus one standard black multi-compartment daypack.

Computer / Messenger Bags: Black soft-sided nylon/polyester style business/laptop bags with carrying handles. (Note: Detachable shoulder straps may or may not be included inside).

Briefcase-Style Bags / Portfolios: Professional-style structured briefcases in brown and reddish-brown finishes. Materials appear to be leather or faux-leather.

Important Notes / Terms of Sale
Condition: All items are in used condition. They show visible signs of daily use, commuting, and storage. Bidders should expect scuffs, scratches, creases (especially on the briefcases), dirt, stains, and general wear to the fabric, straps, and structural piping.

Functionality & Completeness: UNINSPECTED. We have not tested every zipper, clasp, or buckle. Some bags may have broken zippers, missing shoulder straps, missing interior dividers, or small tears in the lining.

Materials & Brands: We do not guarantee the authenticity of any brand names or the specific materials used (e.g., we cannot guarantee if the briefcases are genuine leather or synthetic).

Sold As-Is, Where-Is: This entire lot is being sold strictly "As-Is" with no warranty or guarantee of condition or longevity. Returns or partial refunds will not be accepted. Bidders are strongly encouraged to review all photos carefully before placing a bid.

What You See Is What You Get: The photos represent the exact items included in this lot.
